name: MS GRACE YEAHHHHH
description: It’s over. It’s so over. I MADE IT WORSE AAGHH!! But seriously. I may have accidentally put the soldering gun down onto the grid runways of the motherboard for the ps5 and uhh, burnt it. Ima just buy a new one igBUT YEAHH! Leaving aside the fact I can’t play helldivers rn, I made this! A Grace bot! I hate her. As usual, all the bots I’ve seen of her are either mid, gay, or kinky. Sorry if it’s bad, I’m fucking EXHAUSTED man😭😭
creator: Slipperypete
